guideline_name: Indian Psychiatric Society Clinical Practice Guidelines (verify exact guideline/edition)
citation_title: IPS CPG: Geriatric Psychiatry (verify exact title)
last_reviewed_by: PLACEHOLDER - not yet reviewed; verify against source and sign off

rules.explanation_for_clinician: Antipsychotics increase mortality and cerebrovascular events in elderly patients with dementia (boxed warning); reserve for severe risk/distress after non-pharmacological measures, at the lowest dose for the shortest time, with documented consent and review.
monitoring_required: Document indication and consent; review need for continuation regularly.

rules.explanation_for_clinician: In older adults, start low and go slow, check renal function for renally-cleared drugs, minimise anticholinergic burden, and review regularly (Beers/STOPP).
monitoring_required: Start low, go slow; review regularly and minimise polypharmacy.
